# Friendlinq
# The Free, Ad-Free Social Network — A Facebook Alternative

> Friendlinq is a free social network for adults who want a simpler, safer way to stay connected. No ads, no data selling, no algorithm manipulation. Available on web, iOS, and Android.

## What is Friendlinq?
Friendlinq is a social media platform built for adults who value simplicity, safety, and real connection. Unlike mainstream social networks that rely on ads, data harvesting, and algorithm manipulation, Friendlinq provides a clean, intuitive interface with enhanced privacy protections. It is completely free to join and use — there are no subscription fees, no hidden charges, and no premium tiers required for core features.

Friendlinq is developed and operated by Spire Group Inc.

## Key Facts
- Free social network — no subscription fees, no hidden charges
- No advertisements — your feed shows content from friends and groups, nothing else
- No data selling — personal data is never sold to advertisers, data brokers, or third parties
- No algorithm manipulation — feeds are chronological, not engagement-optimized
- Available on web (any modern browser), iOS (App Store), and Android (Google Play)
- Built for simplicity — large text, clear buttons, intuitive navigation
- Guided tutorial walks new users through every feature step by step

## Core Features
- **Social feed** — community and friends-only posts with text, photos, and video; chronological order; no algorithm
- **Messaging** — real-time private conversations with text, photos, and media attachments
- **Community groups** — join or create groups by interest (gardening, travel, book clubs, cooking, health and wellness, and more)
- **Video and audio calls** — one-on-one and group calls, works on phone, tablet, and computer; no extra app needed
- **Live streaming** — host or join live video streams with friends or groups
- **Photo and video sharing** — upload, organize albums, select profile showcase images, private portfolio visible only to chosen friends
- **Profiles** — personal profile with photo, banner, bio, and interests
- **Community marketplace** — browse and discover local listings and community offerings
- **Events and activities** — discover local events and virtual get-togethers
- **Notifications** — real-time alerts for friend requests, messages, comments, likes, group activity, and live streams
- **Friend management** — search, connect, favorites, accept/reject requests
- **Privacy controls** — post privacy (public/friends-only), private portfolio, block and report users
- **Community moderation** — active monitoring for spam, scams, and policy violations

## How Friendlinq is Different from Facebook
Friendlinq is built from the ground up for people who want simplicity, not a general platform retrofitted for ease of use. Key differences:
- Cleaner navigation with larger text and clear buttons
- No algorithm-driven content manipulation — your feed is chronological
- No advertisements of any kind
- No data selling — your information is never shared with advertisers or data brokers
- Privacy controls designed to actually protect users, not buried in sub-menus
- Step-by-step guided tutorial for new users

## Safety and Privacy
Friendlinq actively monitors for suspicious activity, fake accounts, and spam. Privacy controls include:
- Per-post privacy settings (community or friends-only)
- Private photo portfolio visible only to chosen friends
- Explicit friend request approval for all connections
- One-tap block and report on any user or content
- Moderation team reviews reports and takes action promptly
- Data collected: only what is needed to provide the service (name, email, profile details, content)
- Data NOT collected or used: no tracking across the web, no behavioral profiling, no ad targeting

## Who Friendlinq is For
- Adults who want a simpler, safer social network
- People who find Facebook, Instagram, and other platforms too complex, invasive, or overwhelming
- Family members who want to stay connected across generations
- Community organizations looking for digital social tools
- Anyone looking for social media that respects privacy and doesn't manipulate behavior

## Public Pages
- Homepage: https://friendlinq.com
- About: https://friendlinq.com/about
- Features: https://friendlinq.com/features
- FAQ: https://friendlinq.com/faq
- Safety and Privacy: https://friendlinq.com/safety
- Support: https://friendlinq.com/support
- Contact: https://friendlinq.com/contact
- Sign Up: https://friendlinq.com/register
- Log In: https://friendlinq.com/login

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Friendlinq?
Friendlinq is a free social network designed for adults who want a simpler, safer way to stay connected. It features messaging, community groups, video calls, live streaming, photo sharing, a marketplace, and more — all through an interface built for clarity and comfort. It is completely free to join and use.

### Is Friendlinq free?
Yes, completely free. There are no subscription fees, no hidden charges, and no premium tiers required to access core features including messaging, community groups, photo sharing, video calls, and event discovery.

### How is Friendlinq different from Facebook?
Friendlinq is built from the ground up for people who want simplicity. That means cleaner navigation, larger text, no algorithm-driven content manipulation, no advertisements, and privacy controls designed to actually protect you. Facebook is a general social network built around engagement metrics — Friendlinq is built around you.

### Is Friendlinq safe?
Yes. Friendlinq is built with safety as a top priority. The platform includes enhanced privacy controls, community moderation, and protection from scams and spam. Your personal data is never sold to advertisers or third parties.

### Do I need to be tech-savvy to use Friendlinq?
Not at all. Friendlinq uses large, clear buttons, simple navigation, and straightforward language. There's a guided tutorial that walks you through every feature step by step. If you can browse the internet and send an email, you can use Friendlinq.

### Can my family members join?
Absolutely. Friendlinq is open to adults of all ages. Invite your family, friends, and anyone you want to stay connected with.

### What can I do on Friendlinq?
Connect with friends and family, join interest-based community groups, share photos and updates, send private messages, make video and audio calls, host or join live streams, discover local events, and browse the marketplace — all through an interface designed for simplicity and comfort.

### What devices can I use Friendlinq on?
Friendlinq is available on the web (any modern browser), iOS (iPhone and iPad via the App Store), and Android (via Google Play). Your account works across all devices.

### Is my data sold to advertisers?
No. Friendlinq does not sell your data — ever. There are no ads on the platform, and personal information is not shared with advertisers or data brokers.

### How do I sign up?
Visit https://friendlinq.com/register, enter your name, email address, and a password. It takes less than a minute.

## Contact
- Website: https://friendlinq.com
- Email: info@friendlinq.com
- App Store (iOS): https://apps.apple.com/us/app/friendlinq/id6476931666
- Google Play (Android): https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.app.friendlinq
- Operated by: Spire Group Inc.

## Technical
- Web application built with React
- Mobile apps available on iOS and Android
- Real-time messaging via WebSocket
- Video and audio calls via WebRTC
- Hosted and deployed via GitHub Pages
